activeIngredients: Menthol;Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Oil;Panax Ginseng Root Extract;Anemarrhena Asphodeloides Root Extract;Zingiber Officinale (Ginger) Root Extract;Rosemary Oil;Black Sesame Extract;Licorice Root Extract;Angelica Polymorpha Sinensis Root Extract;Citric Acid;Platycladus Orientalis Leaf Extract;Sophora Flavescens Extract;Biota Orientalis Leaf Extract;Polygonum Multiflorum Root Extract;Eclipta Prostrata Extract;Cinchona Pubescens Bark Extract;Caffeine;Melatonin.
features: Root Activator Shampoo for Men – Formulated with Leaf Extract, this shampoo for men helps cleanse the scalp, removing impurities that can block hair follicles. A thickening shampoo designed to support a healthier scalp for hair growth.

Hair Thickening Shampoo for Stronger Hair – This hair thickening shampoo for men nourishes follicles with essential nutrients, helping hair transition from the shedding phase to the growth phase. It delivers essential nutrients to the scalp and hair, supporting stronger, healthier-looking strands.

Shampoo for Men, Powered by Nature – A plant-based blend that helps stimulate the scalp, enhancing nutrient absorption for optimal hair health. This shampoo for hair growth supports a balanced environment for thicker-looking strands.

Gentle & Skin Friendly Shampoo – A mens hair growth products made without harsh chemicals, making it safe for daily use. This hair regrowth shampoo for men works for all hair types, whether you have straight, wavy, or curly hair.
Revitalize Your Scalp & Strengthen Hair – A routine-friendly formula that nourishes the hair from root to tip. Spartan root activator shampoo for men protects and stimulates hair follicles.
productBenefit: Nourishes and stimulates hair follicles to promote healthy growth.
safetyWarning: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes.
shortDescription: Spartan Root Activator Shampoo nourishes and stimulates hair follicles to promote healthy growth.
title: SPARTAN™ Root Activator Shampoo For Men - Hair Growth Shampoo for Hair Loss and Thinning Hair
